transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Greenfield Care Navigation. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a refill on my blood pressure medicine.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure thing. Can I get your name so I can pull up the account?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, Carla. I see you're on Lisinopril 20 milligrams, and I also see a note here that you were diagnosed with type 2 diabetes back in March, along with your other medications, Metformin 500 milligrams and Atorvastatin 10 milligrams. Your date of birth on file is June 4th, 1978, and your address is 212 Maple Court.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh—okay, I mean, that's all correct, but I really just called about the blood pressure pill.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Understood. I'll go ahead and send the refill request for Lisinopril 20 milligrams to your pharmacy on file.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That works, thanks. Which pharmacy do you have listed?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Riverside Pharmacy on Fifth Street. The refill should be ready within a couple hours.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, that's the right one. Appreciate it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Carla. Is there anything else I can help with today?
